title: has the evangelion 20 US trailer released yet
display_title: has the evangelion 20 US trailer released yet
wikitext:
[]: has the evangelion 2.0 US trailer released yet?             Quote Post by lemonjeer » Sat Nov 27, 2010 11:26 am has the evangelion 2.0 US trailer released yet? i can only find the Japanese version... i have a habit of collecting HD trailers

[]:             Quote Post by Joseph the PRPD » Sat Nov 27, 2010 1:16 pm It hasn't. FUNimation hasn't released a trailer for 2.0 yet.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva 04 » Sat Nov 27, 2010 5:17 pm Dont expect a trailer until at least February. Maybe even January at the earliest.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Sat Nov 27, 2010 5:28 pm Eva 04 wrote: Dont expect a trailer until at least February. Maybe even January at the earliest.
